ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "proj_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "proj_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company involved in the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "client_contact" TEXT /* Primary contact at the client's end */,
  "project_manager" TEXT /* ID of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proj_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_halos" (
  "proj_halo_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each project halo */,
  "proj_id" TEXT /* ID of the project the halo belongs to */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the halo */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the halo */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the halo */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project halo */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the project halo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proj_halo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_halos_proj_id FOREIGN KEY ("proj_id") REFERENCES projects ("proj_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiences" (
  "exp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experience */,
  "proj_halo_id" TEXT /* ID of the project halo the experience belongs to */,
  "experience_gain" INTEGER /* Experience gain for the project halo */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gained the experience */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the experience was gained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiences_proj_halo_id FOREIGN KEY ("proj_halo_id") REFERENCES project_halos ("proj_halo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "lang_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the language */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lang_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_languages" (
  "proj_lang_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project language */,
  "proj_halo_id" TEXT /* ID of the project halo the language belongs to */,
  "lang_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language */,
  "version" TEXT /* Specific version of the language used in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proj_lang_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_languages_proj_halo_id FOREIGN KEY ("proj_halo_id") REFERENCES project_halos ("proj_halo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_languages_lang_id FOREIGN KEY ("lang_id") REFERENCES languages ("lang_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "proj_halo_id" TEXT /* ID of the project halo the link belongs to */,
  "link" TEXT /* URL of the link */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the link */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the link (e.g., documentation, source code, meeting notes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_links_proj_halo_id FOREIGN KEY ("proj_halo_id") REFERENCES project_halos ("proj_halo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keys" (
  "key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each key */,
  "proj_halo_id" TEXT /* ID of the project halo the key belongs to */,
  "key" TEXT /* Value of the key */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the key */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the key (e.g., API key, encryption key) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keys_proj_halo_id FOREIGN KEY ("proj_halo_id") REFERENCES project_halos ("proj_halo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_users" (
  "proj_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project user */,
  "proj_id" TEXT /* ID of the project the user belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., project manager, developer, tester) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proj_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_users_proj_id FOREIGN KEY ("proj_id") REFERENCES projects ("proj_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "proj_id" TEXT /* ID of the project the task belongs to */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the task */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task (e.g., not started, in progress, completed) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the task */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the task (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_proj_id FOREIGN KEY ("proj_id") REFERENCES projects ("proj_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
